# Vendored PDF.js runtime

This directory contains the browser runtime files from `pdfjs-dist` 4.10.38:

- `pdf.min.mjs`
- `pdf.worker.min.mjs`

They were copied from the published npm package so the repo-owned PoC preview
works from a clean checkout without npm installation or an external CDN.
The upstream Apache-2.0 license is preserved in `LICENSE`.

SHA-256:

- `pdf.min.mjs`: `27fc2a057a00f92a4334ad06e17dbd7259912954e9fb7f76400bcca5fd190a9c`
- `pdf.worker.min.mjs`: `1baa1844c89c80a5b2797c916e75ab29254be46d8e9cb53cb6364d7aad84be36`
